key_insights.insight: Shifting focus from outcome-oriented goals to goals that are 100% within your control makes the process more enjoyable and sustainable.
key_insights.quote: But the thing that makes it bearable, the thing that makes it fun is actuallyenjoying the process and shifting away from outcome oriented goals, like a certain numberof views, a certain number of subscribers, and more towards goals that are 100% within ourcontrol.

key_insights.insight: Procrastination is primarily a problem of getting started, and overcoming it requires reducing friction and making the initial step as easy as possible.
key_insights.quote: So the way I think about procrastination,basically, procrastination is a problemwith getting started. Kind of this law of inertia, that if something is at rest,it will continue to stay at rest.

key_insights.insight: It's important to 'un-ickify' tasks by breaking vague goals into clearly defined next action steps to overcome procrastination.
key_insights.quote: There are lots of tasks that are very like vague and ickyand you have to be able to un-ickify a task.

key_insights.insight: Adopting a 'get to' mindset instead of a 'have to' mindset can shift perspective and increase enjoyment in tasks, reducing procrastination.
key_insights.quote: Instead of thinking of have to, think of it as get to. I realized, oh, I get to put in this cannula. I get to make a differencein this patient's lives and life and give her fluids overnight so that she's not gonna dehydrate because of her morningsickness and just that mindset shift immediately made me feel so much better about it.

key_insights.insight: When finding out your values, decide what makes you feel good.
key_insights.quote: I just go on based on how things make me feel. And that seems to be the only indicationI have of what's true for me and what's not if i if i'malone and i watch a video of a baby um suffering or crying and it makes me sad when no one's aroundyeah and i'm not having to tweet about my feelings to the world then i would assume that that is

key_insights.insight: People often procrastinate because they are psychologically uncomfortable and do not feel competent to do the task at hand.
key_insights.quote: People procrastinate usually because there's a great deal of psychological discomfort surrounding like you don't have the answers so i don't know how to use themachines at the gym or i don't actually have i don't feel competent enough to even write thisessay

If you make one video every week for two years,then I 100% guarantee it will change your life. I can't put any numbers on it. I can't tell you you'll have 100,000 subscribersor how much money you'll be making, but I can 100% guarantee it will change your lifeat the very least in terms of the skillsand the experience and the contactand the friends you're going to make through that process.

actionable_advice.advice: Use the 'Two Minute Rule' to overcome procrastination.
actionable_advice.how_to: Convince yourself to only work on a task for two minutes, with the option to stop after. This often leads to continuing beyond the initial two minutes.

actionable_advice.advice: Define a 'Daily Highlight' to increase productivity.
actionable_advice.how_to: Each morning, identify the single most important task for the day and schedule time to complete it.

actionable_advice.advice: Focus on testing yourself rather than consuming information.
actionable_advice.how_to: After reading, focus on active recall and test yourself. The harder it feels, the more you are learning.

memorable_stories: Ali shares his story of feeling pressure to pursue medicine due to his family background and the perceived prestige, even though his passion was in coding and entrepreneurship.

Ali tells the story of working in the hospital after a 13 hour shift, and remembering the saying by Seth Godin, to think 'get to' instead of 'have to', leading to a positive interaction with a patient.
contrarian_claims: Chasing 'impact' and wealth can be a form of 'virtue signaling', and one should be selfish enough to create a life where one has shit to talk about.
He claims one should focus on solving the money problem instead of virtue signaling the desire for impact.
Young people need to accept that work does not have to be suffering.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Productivity Expert: How To Finally Stay Productive: Ali Abdaal
